product_definition.title: AI Behavior System
product_definition.description: A modular AI behavior framework for UE5.5 using Behavior Trees, EQS, and AI Perception. Includes patrol, chase, attack, flee, and investigate states. Supports squads and AI communication via GameplayMessages.
product_definition.target_audience: Action, stealth, and open-world game developers

core_features: Blackboard keys: TargetActor, LastKnownLocation, PatrolIndex, AlertLevel
Patrol task: BTTask_Patrol with patrol point array
Chase task: BTTask_MoveToTarget with dynamic re-pathing
EQS query for cover point selection
Alert system: Unaware, Suspicious, Alerted states
Debug draw: perception cone, patrol path, state label

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Enemy patrols between points, detects player, chases and attacks
